package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_depends_on_gin_abort_or_context_error_response: Services that own transport abort behavior.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule164NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule164NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule164NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario164Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule164NegativeService, input Rule164NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
